hero.subtitle1: Prove your skills with daily commits.
hero.subtitle2: The more you contribute, the more splendid your tier becomes.

whatCounts.label: Contributions
whatCounts.title: Everything counts.
whatCounts.subtitle: Five types of GitHub activity power your tier.
whatCounts.commitsDesc: Push code changes to any repository.
whatCounts.issuesDesc: Report bugs or suggest new features.

showcase.title: Show it off on GitHub.
showcase.subtitle: Generate a beautiful tier badge and embed it in your README.

howTo.label: Getting Started
howTo.title: Simple as 1, 2, 3, 4.
howTo.step1Desc: Sign in with your GitHub account.
howTo.step2Desc: View your current tier on My Page.
howTo.step3Desc: Set your font and background color, then save.
howTo.step4Desc: Copy the code and paste it into your GitHub README.

toast.error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
toast.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please try with simpler settings.
toast.saveFailed: Failed to save image. Please try again.

noticeData.title: Git TIERS Renewal
noticeData.content:
The Git TIERS page has been completely redesigned.

What's new:
- Full landing page redesign (dark theme)
- Scroll-driven tier progression animation
- Improved tier image design
- My Page UI improvements
- Notice page redesign
- Korean/English language support
- Security enhancements (token protection, server-side API migration)
- Image generation changed to SVG (always crisp, no more blurry images)

We will continue to improve the service.
Thank you for your continued interest and support.

noticeData.title: Function update information
noticeData.content:
Instead of downloading and attaching images, 
a feature has been added that allows you to simply copy the code and paste it into README. 
This change is simpler and more convenient, 
so we hope you enjoy it.

noticeData.title: Service Launch
noticeData.content:
Git TIERS service has been launched.
Please use it a lot.
Please refer to GitHub for more details.
If you have any inconveniences or improvements, please email us.

noticeData.title: Service development in progress
noticeData.content:
Development of the Git Tier service is in progress.
We ask for your interest.
